coreJobStatement: Transform water, malt, hops, and yeast into packaged beer through controlled biochemical and physical processes
productJobStatement: Help Glycol Sensing & Control to measure volumetric flow rate of glycol/water coolant per cooling zone in brewery fermentation and conditioning systems without obstructing flow or requiring mechanical maintenance
lPath: L7 Beer Manufacturing Ecosystem > L6.6 Glycol Cooling & Refrigeration > L5.6.3 Glycol Sensing & Control > L4.6.3.1 Ultrasonic Flow Sensor

segments.name: High-volume production brewery (>100K bbl/yr)
segments.characteristics: 50+ tanks, fully automated glycol PLC, continuous production, food-safety audit requirements
segments.targetabilityReason: demands mag meters or high-end ultrasonic; rejects manual
segments.circumstance: 50+ tanks, fully automated glycol PLC, continuous production, food-safety audit requirements
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — demands mag meters or high-end ultrasonic; rejects manual

segments.name: Mid-size regional craft brewery (10K–100K bbl/yr)
segments.characteristics: 10–50 tanks, semi-automated glycol, batch production, growing quality pressure
segments.targetabilityReason: cost-sensitive but quality-driven; open to ultrasonic upgrade from paddle-wheel
segments.circumstance: 10–50 tanks, semi-automated glycol, batch production, growing quality pressure
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — cost-sensitive but quality-driven; open to ultrasonic upgrade from paddle-wheel

segments.name: Small/taproom craft brewery (<10K bbl/yr)
segments.characteristics: 3–10 tanks, basic thermostat + solenoid control, manual glycol monitoring
segments.targetabilityReason: price-dominant; paddle-wheel or no measurement incumbent
segments.circumstance: 3–10 tanks, basic thermostat + solenoid control, manual glycol monitoring
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — price-dominant; paddle-wheel or no measurement incumbent

segments.name: Contract/co-packing brewery
segments.characteristics: Frequent recipe changes, strict batch traceability, diverse beer styles per week
segments.targetabilityReason: needs rapid reconfiguration and per-batch logging
segments.circumstance: Frequent recipe changes, strict batch traceability, diverse beer styles per week
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — needs rapid reconfiguration and per-batch logging

segments.name: Non-alcoholic/specialty brewery
segments.characteristics: Tighter temperature control (±0.2°C), dealcoholization processes, higher process complexity
segments.targetabilityReason: precision demands exceed standard craft; mag meter or ultrasonic required
segments.circumstance: Tighter temperature control (±0.2°C), dealcoholization processes, higher process complexity
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — precision demands exceed standard craft; mag meter or ultrasonic required

alternatives.name: Ultrasonic transit-time flow sensor
alternatives.tradeoffs: ±1–3% accuracy (vs ±0.5% mag); degrades with air bubbles >2% vol; requires straight pipe run 5–10×DN; needs fluid-type configuration at commissioning [SRC: web_search]

alternatives.name: Electromagnetic (mag) flowmeter
alternatives.tradeoffs: 3–5× cost ($800–2,000 vs $150–400); requires conductive liquid; larger footprint; higher power consumption (10–20 W vs <0.1 W); overkill accuracy for glycol monitoring [SRC: web_search]

alternatives.name: Paddle-wheel / turbine flow sensor
alternatives.tradeoffs: Moving parts wear in glycol service (bearing degradation in 6–18 months); particle jamming; contamination risk from internals; requires periodic replacement; ±2–5% accuracy drift over life [SRC: web_search]

alternatives.name: Differential-pressure measurement (orifice/venturi)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Permanent pressure drop (wastes pump energy); fouling of sensing ports in glycol; limited turndown ratio (3:1 vs 10:1+ for ultrasonic); requires differential pressure transmitter [SRC: web_search]

alternatives.name: Do nothing / manual inspection [Status Quo]
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero measurement cost — but no flow visibility, no automated fault detection, manual temperature checks only; temperature excursion discovered only after batch damage

jobSteps.rationale: Pre-batch verification depends on sensor diagnostics capability

jobSteps.rationale: Core measurement function — the primary value-creating action

jobSteps.rationale: Anomaly detection and signal quality are sensor-dependent
